descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 1-1 in Abbott Cup series, with Jason Phillips scoring three goals in Game Two.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes evened their best-of-seven Abbott Cup series against the Humboldt Broncos at one win apiece on April 22, 1987. Richmond won Game Two at the Humboldt Uniplex, with Jason Phillips scoring three goals and adding an assist. Humboldt coach Bernie Lynch criticized his team's lack of intensity, noting the loss ended their 17-game winning streak. Game Three was scheduled for that evening at 7:30 in Humboldt.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Even Abbott Cup Series with Humboldt
